ZETTLER FOR FAILURE TO FILE WITHIN THE TIME REQUIRED. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES WAS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J.
